cpSection: ECT Level I Basic Technique Course 4.0

lessons.title: Lab: Filter Effects on Rotating Reference Standards
objectives: Demonstrate the effect of filter settings on signals from rotating reference standards
Identify over-filtered and under-filtered signal conditions
Optimize filters for a given rotational speed
cp105Topics: 4.1 Demo filter effects on rotating reference standards

lessons.title: Lab: Liftoff and Frequency Effects
objectives: Demonstrate liftoff effects on signal amplitude and phase
Demonstrate frequency effects on signal response and penetration
Compensate for liftoff using phase rotation and probe technique

lessons.title: Lab: Rotational and Forward Speed Effects
objectives: Demonstrate how rotational and forward (throughput) speed affect signal response
Match filter and speed settings to maintain detection sensitivity
Document speed-related limits for a test setup
cp105Topics: 4.4 Demo rotational and forward speed effects

lessons.title: Lab: Generating a Z-Curve with Conductivity Standards
objectives: Generate a Z-curve using a full set of conductivity standards
Verify instrument standardization against known conductivity values
Use the completed Z-curve to evaluate unknown samples
cp105Topics: 4.5 Generate a Z-curve with conductivity standards
